mapper.sql: from after_sale_application a left join demo_order o on a.order_id=o.id left join user_account u on a.user_id=u.id left join after_sale_risk_assessment ra on ra.application_id=a.id
mapper.select:
select a.id, a.application_no, a.order_id, o.order_no, o.product_name, a.user_id, u.display_name as user_display_name, a.service_type, a.status, a.priority, a.risk_level, ra.risk_score, ra.risk_level as assessment_risk_level, ra.risk_tags, ra.suggested_action, a.refund_amount, a.sla_deadline, a.created_at, a.updated_at
order by case when a.sla_deadline < now() then 0 else 1 end, case a.priority when 'URGENT' then 0 when 'HIGH' then 1 when 'NORMAL' then 2 else 3 end, a.sla_deadline asc, a.updated_at desc
